[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Hab''' was an officer who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]], during the latter's search for the [[Vergence/Legends|Force nexus]] known as the [[Valley of the Jedi]].

==Biography==
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Hab was an officer who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] during his search for the [[Valley of the Jedi]], a [[Vergence/Legends|Force nexus]] containing numerous trapped [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] souls. When the valley was discovered in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], Hab was among the [[Troop/Legends|troops]] assigned to excavate it under [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Vig]].

The excavation works, however, were complicated by the presence of the [[Force ghost/Legends|spirits]] of the Jedi and Sith that roamed around the valley, and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Yun]], one of Jerec's [[Seven Dark Jedi|apprentices]] came to handle the problem. Upon his arrival, Major Vig hosted a formal lunch in a repurposed storeroom with a [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] and another Lieutenant. After the meal, one such "Screamer" spirit possessed Hab and tried to suffocate him. Yun attempted to rescue Hab, attracting the spirit in him.

==Behind the scenes==
Hab's first and as yet only appearance was in the [[1998]] novella ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'', written by [[William C. Dietz]]. Hab's species and gender were never specified in the book.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' {{1st}}
